name: Mandela Osimbo
message:
Work Skills and Motivation for Working in Europe
I possess a strong set of practical and interpersonal skills developed through my experience as a Childcare and Youth Support Practitioner and Health Care Support Worker, working with children and young people with complex needs. My work has required a high level of responsibility, compassion, and professionalism, particularly when supporting vulnerable and at‑risk children.
Work Skills
I am experienced in providing daily care, supervision, and emotional support to children with complex emotional and behavioural needs, including those affected by trauma, neglect, abuse, and abandonment. I apply trauma‑informed approaches to care, ensuring that children feel safe, respected, and supported at all times.
My role has strengthened my skills in safeguarding and child protection, including recognising signs of distress or risk, responding appropriately to safeguarding concerns, and reporting incidents in line with organisational and legal procedures. I understand the importance of maintaining confidentiality, professionalism, and ethical standards when working with vulnerable individuals.
I have well‑developed communication and listening skills, enabling me to build trusting relationships with children, families, colleagues, social workers, and educators. I work effectively as part of a multidisciplinary team, contributing positively to care planning and collaborative decision‑making.
I am also skilled in behaviour management and de‑escalation, supporting children to develop positive coping mechanisms, emotional regulation, and life skills. I maintain accurate records and reports to monitor progress and ensure continuity of care. Additionally, my community outreach experience has strengthened my ability to engage families, promote wellbeing, and support children in diverse social and cultural contexts.
Motivation for Working in Europe
I am motivated to work in Europe because of the region’s strong commitment to high‑quality childcare, healthcare standards, and safeguarding practices, particularly in protecting the rights and wellbeing of children and vulnerable individuals. European care systems emphasise professional development, ethical practice, and person‑centred care, which strongly align with my personal values and career goals.
Working in Europe would provide an opportunity to further develop my professional skills, gain international experience, and learn from well‑established care frameworks while contributing positively to care services. I am eager to apply my skills in a structured and regulated environment where high standards of care, safety, and dignity are prioritised.
I am also highly motivated by the opportunity to work within diverse, multicultural teams, broaden my perspective, and share my experience of supporting vulnerable children and communities. I believe my adaptability, cultural sensitivity, and strong work ethic would enable me to integrate well and make a meaningful contribution to organisations in Europe.
Ultimately, my motivation is driven by a genuine passion for supporting children and vulnerable people, promoting wellbeing, and making a positive difference in their lives while continuing to grow professionally in an international setting.

Jerson Alberto Castro García soy un técnico profesional en instalación y mantenimiento eléctrico con experiencia en servicio al cliente, administración, ventas y supervisión de equipos de trabajo. Cuenta con formación técnica en electricidad, redes y telecomunicaciones, además de conocimientos en sistemas eléctricos de baja y media tensión, circuitos eléctricos, transformadores y sistemas de protección a tierra. 

He desarrollado experiencia laboral en diferentes áreas incluyendo distribución de materiales eléctricos, servicio al cliente, administración institucional y gestión de inventarios. También ha ocupado cargos de liderazgo como encargado de tienda, supervisor de personal y gerente departamental, coordinando equipos de trabajo y supervisando operaciones comerciales. 

Poseo habilidades destacadas en liderazgo, comunicación efectiva, gestión de activos, resolución de problemas y trabajo en equipo. Además, cuenta con formación en redes de telecomunicaciones, CCTV, sistemas de conectividad y seguridad laboral, lo que le permite desempeñarse tanto en entornos técnicos como administrativos. 

Actualmente curso estudios universitarios en ingeniería industrial y cuenta con licencia de conducir categoría 2. Su perfil combina habilidades técnicas, comerciales y de liderazgo, lo que le permite adaptarse a distintos entornos laborales y aportar valor en proyectos técnicos, administrativos y de atención al cliente.

name: arjay tangson
message:
I have hands-on experience working in agricultural production, particularly in fruit harvesting in Israel. During my time there, I worked in orchards harvesting avocados, apples, and grapes. This experience helped me develop strong practical skills in proper fruit picking, sorting, and handling to maintain quality standards for both local markets and export.
As a farm worker, I was responsible for carefully harvesting fruits at the right maturity stage, ensuring minimal damage during picking, and following strict guidelines for grading and packing. I also worked under different weather conditions, which strengthened my physical endurance, patience, and ability to stay focused on tasks for long hours. Working in a multicultural environment also improved my adaptability and communication skills with people from different backgrounds.
In addition to my international experience, I am currently working with the Department of Agriculture, where I continue to enhance my knowledge and skills in sustainable and organic farming practices. I have attended several trainings and seminars related to agriculture, which helped me understand the importance of quality production, environmental sustainability, and proper farm management.

I am a hardworking, reliable, and fast learner. I can work independently or as part of a team, and I always make sure to follow instructions carefully while maintaining efficiency and productivity. I take pride in doing my job well and contributing positively to the workplace.
My motivation for working in Europe is to further improve my skills, gain more international experience, and support my personal and professional growth. I am eager to learn new farming techniques, adapt to different agricultural systems, and contribute my knowledge and experience to your farm. I am also highly motivated to provide for my family and build a better future through honest and dedicated work.

name: Dilruk Gunasekara
message:
I am a compassionate, dedicated, and adaptable healthcare professional with a strong background in caregiving, medical support, healthcare operations, and relationship management. My career has been shaped by a deep commitment to improving the lives of others, whether by providing direct patient care, supporting medical professionals, or contributing to the growth and success of healthcare organizations. I bring together practical experience, strong communication skills, and a patient-centered mindset to deliver quality service in every role I take on.

I hold a Bachelor of Commerce in Health Care Management from IIC University of Technology, Cambodia, which has given me a solid academic foundation in healthcare systems, administration, and management principles. In addition to my degree, I have completed professional qualifications in caregiving, soft skills development, and supervisory skills, all of which have strengthened my ability to work effectively with patients, colleagues, and healthcare teams. My education has helped me combine knowledge with hands-on experience, allowing me to approach challenges with both professionalism and compassion.

My professional journey includes experience as an In-Patient Caregiver at Asia Medihealth Services Pvt Limited in Sri Lanka, where I provided essential daily support to patients. My responsibilities included personal care, bathing, dressing, feeding, mobility assistance, medication management, and health monitoring. Beyond physical assistance, I also offered emotional support and worked closely with medical teams to ensure each patient received holistic, dignified, and compassionate care. This role strengthened my patience, empathy, time management, and ability to remain calm and reliable in a fast-paced environment.

I also worked as a Medical Delegate – Special Projects at CitiHealth Imports Pvt Limited, where I contributed to strategic market development initiatives, product launches, and engagement activities. In this role, I built and maintained strong relationships with consultant doctors, general practitioners, pharmacists, and other healthcare professionals. Through meetings, conferences, and exhibitions, I helped present and demonstrate products while supporting the organization’s business growth. This experience improved my confidence, presentation skills, and ability to communicate effectively with diverse professional audiences.

Earlier in my career, I served as an Assistant Manager at Melsta Laboratories Pvt Ltd and as a Medical Information Specialist at Searle Pharmaceutical. These positions allowed me to develop leadership skills, operational understanding, and a strong focus on customer and stakeholder relationships. I was responsible for managing teams, supporting business development, handling government and corporate affairs, and building professional relationships with healthcare experts. name: MICHAEL Ojimah
message:
I am a hardworking and versatile professional with extensive experience in carpentry, furniture making, facility management, general labour, and IT support. Over the years, I have worked in different roles that have strengthened my technical abilities, problem-solving skills, and ability to adapt to various working environments. My experience includes furniture making, cabinet installation, construction carpentry, warehouse support, facility maintenance, and vocational training.

As a Furniture Maker and Cabinet Maker, I have been responsible for constructing, assembling, and installing high-quality furniture such as cabinets, wardrobes, shelves, kitchen units, and custom-built wooden fixtures. I work with technical drawings and precise measurements to ensure accuracy and quality. I am skilled in selecting appropriate timber, plywood, hardware, and finishing materials, as well as operating woodworking machines and hand tools such as saws, routers, planers, sanders, and drills. I also carry out repairs, refinishing, and refurbishment of furniture while maintaining high safety standards.

In construction and general labour roles, I have experience in formwork installation, roofing, framing, drywall installation, flooring, partitioning, demolition, site preparation, and material handling. I am physically fit, energetic, and capable of working long hours in demanding environments while following strict health and safety procedures.

I have also worked as a TVET Carpentry Trainer and Centre Manager, where I trained students in practical carpentry skills, supervised workshop activities, developed training materials, and managed daily training centre operations. This improved my leadership, communication, teamwork, and organizational skills.

My motivation for working in Europe comes from my desire for professional growth, better opportunities, and the chance to contribute my skills in a productive and well-structured environment. I am motivated by hard work, learning, and delivering excellent results. Europe offers an opportunity to work in a system that values dedication, quality, and professionalism. I am eager to bring my experience, discipline, and strong work ethic to an employer who values reliability and performance. I am also committed to building a better future for myself and my family through honest work, continuous learning, and international exposure.

name: Roseshaine Clarion
message:
Dear Hiring Manager,
I am writing to express my strong interest in the position of Analyst at your esteemed organization. After reviewing the job description and requirements, I believe that my skills and experience align perfectly with the responsibilities outlined.
With a strong career spanning international banking operations and specialized trade finance, I am writing to express my strong interest in joining your team. Currently serving as a Trade Finance Analyst for the Netherlands and Belgium markets at ING Group NV, I possess a deep technical understanding of the complexities involved in global trade instruments and regulatory compliance.
In my current role, I manage the full lifecycle of Import and Export Documentary Letters of Credit, Collections, and Standby LCs. My expertise extends beyond basic processing to include the issuance of tailor-made LCs, advising and confirming credits to beneficiaries, and managing complex reimbursement claims and risk participation transactions. I am particularly skilled in monitoring usance bills through to final settlement, ensuring that both bank and client interests are protected.
Key Competencies I Offer:
•	Trade Operations: Full-course processing of LCs, SBLCs, and Inward/Outward Collections.
•	Strategic Oversight: Handling risk participation and monitoring usance bills for acceptance.
•	Regulatory Integrity: Performing rigorous compliance and AML/KYC screenings per bank guidelines.
•	Operational Foundation: Over six years of experience at East West Bank managing General Ledger reconciliations, FOREX, and payroll uploads.
With a solid background in banking and customer service, I have gained extensive experience in handling over-the-counter transactions and miscellaneous transactions. I am adept at ensuring proper identification of clients in adherence to the bank's policies and procedures, as well as external regulatory requirements. Moreover, I have consistently ensured the completeness of all documentary requirements for both new and existing customers, consistently meeting high standards of accuracy and
My transition from a Senior Bank Service Associate to a specialized Analyst has been defined by a commitment to accuracy and efficiency. Whether reconciling subsidiary ledgers or handling cross-border payments, I prioritize meticulous documentation and strict adherence to banking standards. Furthermore, my early background in international customer service in Bahrain provided me with the cultural adaptability and communication skills necessary for high-stakes client interactions.


I take great pride in my ability to complete AML/KYC documents accurately and effectively. I have a strong understanding of proper client risk tagging, conducting due diligence for clients tagged as Normal Risk, and enhanced due diligence for clients labeled as High Risk. Furthermore, I am well-versed in conducting proper watchlist screenings to ensure compliance and mitigate potential risks.
Throughout my career, I have consistently demonstrated exceptional communication skills and a strong commitment to customer satisfaction. I have a proven track record of effectively resolving customer complaints and providing excellent service. My ability to upsell and cross-sell products has also contributed to the success of previous roles.
I am eager to bring my technical proficiency and dedicated work ethic to your organization. Thank you for your time and for considering my application.
Thank you for considering my application. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss my qualifications further and provide any additional information you may require. I can be reached at the contact information provided below.

Sincerely,
Roseshaine Clarion

name: Kiplangat Molel
message:
About Me
I am a hardworking, reliable, and physically capable worker from Kenya with over six years of hands-on experience across agricultural production, industrial operations, and logistics support. I am fluent in English, eager to relocate to Europe, and eligible for visa sponsorship. I bring the kind of work ethic that is built over years of demanding shifts — not claimed on paper.

My Experience
At James Finlay Flower II, one of Kenya's largest commercial greenhouses, I spent three years doing the full range of farm production work: planting, cultivating, irrigating, harvesting, spraying crops, applying fertilizers, grading and sorting produce, maintaining biosecurity, and keeping the facility clean and safe to strict standards. I worked long physical shifts in demanding conditions and met production targets every single time.
At Chelal Tea Factory, I spent five years supporting large-scale agricultural processing operations — coordinating field teams, managing inventory, tracking materials, maintaining equipment, preparing production reports, and ensuring compliance with safety and quality standards throughout. This was not desk work. It was operational, physical, and demanding, and I handled it with consistency and reliability for five years.

My Skills
Across both roles I developed a broad skill set that transfers directly into European work environments:
In agriculture and farm work — crop cultivation and harvesting, greenhouse operations, irrigation system operation, fertilizer and spray application, quality inspection and grading, biosecurity and sanitation, and weed and pest management.
In factory and production — materials tracking and inventory management, equipment inspection and basic maintenance, quality control and compliance checks, production reporting, following SOPs and safety regulations, and supporting supervisors and technical teams with operational tasks.
In warehouse and logistics — loading, unloading, and transporting materials, inventory replenishment and record-keeping, coordinating supply flow between teams, working to tight deadlines under pressure, and maintaining accurate documentation.

Why Europe
Europe offers something I am genuinely looking for: a structured, well-run working environment where effort is recognised, safety is taken seriously, and workers are treated with respect. I want to contribute to that kind of workplace — not just to earn, but to grow, to learn new techniques, and to build a long-term career. I am not looking for a short stint. I am looking for an employer who values a worker who shows up every day and does the job properly.

Why Hire Me
I will not slow a team down. I follow instructions carefully, I adapt quickly to new environments and crops, and I do not stop until the job is done right. I have worked in heat, dust, long shifts, and high-pressure seasonal deadlines — and I have done it consistently across six years without a recorded safety incident. I am physically fit, safety-conscious, and ready to start. If you give me the opportunity, I will earn your trust through the quality of my work.

Contact: +254 716 696 102 | kipla.malel@gmail.com | Open to relocation anywhere in Europe | Visa sponsorship eligible

name: Elijah Davison Munyoke
message:
Here’s a straightforward casual answer you can use:

*Waiter skills:*  
I’m attentive without being in the way - I can read a table and know when someone needs a refill or just wants to be left alone. I’m organized, so I can handle multiple orders at once and keep everything accurate, even when it’s busy. I’ve got good communication, whether it’s explaining a menu, recommending a wine, or dealing with a complaint calmly. I’m also quick on my feet and comfortable with POS systems, cash, and card payments. Most importantly, I work well with the kitchen and other staff because service falls apart if we’re not communicating.

*Motivation for working in Europe:*  
For me it’s about the culture around food and hospitality. In Europe, dining isn’t just fast food - it’s an experience. People take time over meals, and there’s more emphasis on quality, presentation, and building a connection with guests. I find that more rewarding than just turning tables.

I’m also motivated by the chance to grow personally and professionally. Working in a different country pushes you to adapt, learn a bit of the local language, and work with people from all backgrounds. It makes you more flexible and confident. And honestly, the food, wine, and café culture in places like Italy and Portugal are inspiring - you end up caring more about what you serve because the standards are higher.

So it’s a mix of professional growth and wanting to be in an environment where hospitality is treated as a real craft, not just a job.

message:
Cover Letter – Hamilton Eduardo Kuzola

My name is Hamilton Eduardo Kuzola, and I am highly motivated to build my professional career in the Netherlands. I am drawn to the Dutch work culture, which is based on efficiency, respect, innovation, and valuing people. I believe the Dutch work environment aligns with my core values: responsibility, punctuality, and a constant desire to learn.

My motivation to work in the Netherlands

I want to contribute my energy, discipline, and customer service experience while learning new processes and adapting to an international market. I am willing to learn the language, integrate into the culture, and add value from day one.

 Experience
I have experience working in customer service at a supermarket. In this role, I developed essential skills for any work environment:  
- Customer Service: Assisted, guided, and resolved customer questions with speed and courtesy, even during peak hours.  
-Working Under Pressure: Managed cashier operations and store flow, controlling lines and ensuring customer satisfaction.

My Skills
- Clear and respectful communication with customers and coworkers  
- Speed and attention to detail  
- Fast learner and adaptable to new routines  
- Committed to schedules and targets  
- Problem-solving during customer interactions  
- Professional attitude, strong work ethic, and good interpersonal skills  
- Willing to do physical work and flexible shifts  

I am ready to apply my customer service experience and dedication to sectors such as logistics, production, hospitality, retail, or services in the Netherlands. I am committed to delivering results and I want to grow together with the company that believes in my potential.

Thank you for the opportunity to introduce myself. I am available for a conversation at your convenience.

Sincerely,  
Hamilton Eduardo Kuzola

name: Mohammed Haddaj
message:
العمل في الخارج ليس مجرد خطوة مهنية، بل هو رحلة تحول شخصية مدفوعة بأسباب تختلف من فرد لآخر حسب طموحاته وظروفه.
​إليك أبرز الدوافع التي تجعل الكثيرين يختارون خوض هذه التجربة:
​1. الدوافع الاقتصادية والمادية
​تعتبر المحرك الأساسي للأغلبية، وتشمل:
​تحسين الدخل: الحصول على رواتب أعلى مقارنة بالسوق المحلي، مما يساعد في تأمين حياة كريمة أو الادخار للمستقبل.
​قوة العملة: الاستفادة من فرق العملة لإرسال تحويلات مالية تساعد الأهل أو لاستثمارها في الوطن.
​المزايا الوظيفية: الحصول على تأمين صحي شامل، بدل سكن، وتذاكر سفر، وهي ميزات قد لا تتوفر بنفس الجودة محلياً.
​2. الدوافع المهنية والتطويرية
​يبحث الطموحون دائماً عن بيئة عمل تضمن لهم القفز بمسيرتهم المهنية:
​اكتساب خبرات عالمية: العمل في شركات كبرى أو بيئات تقنية متقدمة يثقل السيرة الذاتية بشكل كبير.
​تعلم لغات جديدة: ممارسة اللغة في بيئتها الأصلية هي أسرع وسيلة للإتقان.
​بناء شبكة علاقات دولية: التواصل مع محترفين من جنسيات مختلفة يفتح آفاقاً لفرص مستقبلية غير محدودة.
​3. الدوافع الشخصية والاجتماعية
​الرغبة في التغيير واكتشاف الذات تلعب دوراً كبيراً:
​الاستقلالية والاعتماد على النفس: العيش وحيداً في بلد غريب يصقل الشخصية ويعزز القدرة على حل المشكلات.
​الانفتاح الثقافي: التعرف على عادات وتقاليد جديدة يوسع المدارك ويغير النظرة للحياة.
​البحث عن جودة حياة أفضل: الرغبة في العيش في بيئة توفر خدمات تعليمية، صحية، وترفيهية ذات جودة عالية.

name: Diariba Hervé Bertrand KARA
message:
I am a versatile and dedicated agricultural worker from Burkina Faso with over 15 years of hands-on experience in both crop farming and livestock production.
I started working on my family farm in 2005, where I gained solid experience in cultivating a variety of crops such as maize, peanuts, mangoes, and oranges. Over the years, I have been actively involved in planting, maintaining crops, and managing harvests while respecting quality standards and safety procedures. This experience has helped me develop strong discipline, physical endurance, and the ability to work efficiently in demanding environments and changing weather conditions.
In 2023, I launched my own small farm focused on poultry farming, raising chickens and turkeys. I manage all aspects of the operation independently, including feeding, animal care, hygiene, and facility maintenance. This has strengthened my sense of responsibility, organization, and decision-making, while reinforcing my commitment to animal welfare and sustainable agricultural practices.
I am known for being reliable, punctual, and hardworking. I adapt quickly to new environments, work well both independently and as part of a team, and maintain a strong attention to detail in everything I do. I also have basic knowledge of plant care and biological diagnostics, which helps me maintain healthy crops.
My motivation to work in Europe comes from my desire to grow professionally, discover modern agricultural techniques, and contribute my experience to high-standard farming operations. I am particularly interested in improving my skills, working in a structured environment, and building a stable future through honest and dedicated work.
At the same time, I am actively improving my English to better integrate and communicate effectively in an international work environment.

name: Hasan ALALI
message:
Explanation of Motivation to Work and Relocate to Europe

I would like to explain my motivation for seeking work in Europe and relocating with my family.

For many years, I was living a stable life in Palestine and I had my own private agricultural business, which was very successful and provided a good and stable income for my family. I worked in dairy farming, vegetable cultivation, beekeeping, and managing agricultural land. Through hard work over many years, I was able to build a productive and profitable farm.

Unfortunately, due to the difficult security situation in Palestine, my work and property have been exposed to serious risks. We have faced threats of damage and destruction to agricultural property, including the burning and vandalism of farms and the risk of land confiscation. These conditions have caused significant financial losses and created an unstable and unsafe environment for my family.

Because of this situation, I made the difficult decision to seek a safer future for my family in Europe, where we can live in security, stability, and dignity.

I am a father of four children. My daughter has completed her university studies in cosmetology and skin care, my son is currently in secondary school, and I have two younger children aged 8 and 4 years old. My main goal is to provide them with a safe environment, access to education, and a stable future.

I am a hardworking and responsible person, and I am ready to contribute positively to society through honest work in agriculture or farming. I am looking for long-term employment and stability, with the hope of building a secure life for my family.

Thank you for your understanding and consideration.

👉 يمكنك زيارة الموقع للبحث وتقديم سيرتك الذاتية مباشرة:
🔗 Electric Jobs EU – Skilled Electricians Needed in Europe 

🇬🇧 وظائف كهربائي بعقد في المملكة المتحدة (UK)
هذه إعلانات حديثة لعقود عمل في بريطانيا (قد تحتاج إلى ترخيص أو بطاقة معترف بها في UK): 

🔹 Contract Electrician – Cambridge / Nottinghamshire / Burton-on-Trent
💼 وظائف مع عُقود مؤقتة أو طويلة، غالبًا مع فرصة استمرار العمل بعدها. 

💼 أجور: من حوالي £24 – £30+ بالساعة حسب الخبرة. 

🔹 Electrician Temp to Perm – Oxford / Bedford / Leicester
💼 عقود عمل مؤقتة قابلة للتحول لعقد دائم. 

🔹 Electrician – Commercial & Installation Roles Across UK
💼 فرص بعقود طويلة على مشاريع تجارية كبيرة، تدريب وإمكانية ترقيات. 

📌 هذه الوظائف تمنح عقد عمل قانوني في غالب الأحيان مع دفع أجر ثابت ومدة محددة أو مفتوحة، ويمكنك التقديم مباشرة لإرسال الـ CV الخاص بك.

🇪🇸 فرصة مثيرة في إسبانيا
📍 فرصة عمل كـ فني كهربائي Technicien Électricien في Huesca – إسبانيا بعقد دائم (permanent contract) مع راتب جذاب + سيارة مقدمة من الشركة. 

🔹 هذه الوظيفة توفر استقرار وتعاقد طويل الأمد، وتعتبر من فرص العمل الأوروبية الممتازة للكهربائيين.

📌 نصائح للتقديم السريع
🔸 حضّر نسخة CV بالإنجليزية أو بلغة الدولة (الألمانية/الفرنسية/الإسبانية) إن أمكن.
🔸 تأكد من أن شهادتك وخبرتك مذكورة بوضوح ومرتّبة.
🔸 أرسل الطلب مباشرة عبر مواقع الوظائف أو أرفق بريدك الإلكتروني للتقديم.

🎯 خطوات سريعة للتقديم الآن
افتح موقع Electric Jobs EU وقم بتحميل فرص العمل المتاحة. 

قدّم سيرتك في وظائف Electrician UK عبر مواقع مثل CareerStructure/Totaljobs. 

إذا تحب فرصة في إسبانيا بعقد دائم، قدّم على الوظيفة المذكورة في Huesca.

الإجابة على سوال صف تجربتك ودوافعك ولماذا تريد العمل في الخارج 

ChatGPT a dit :
تمام، هذه إجابة جاهزة وقوية يمكنك استخدامها مباشرة (وتعديلها قليلًا إذا أحببت):

لدي خبرة عملية واسعة في مجال تركيب الشبكات الكهربائية للبناءات، حيث عملت لعدة سنوات في تنفيذ وتمديد الأنظمة الكهربائية للمباني السكنية والتجارية، وشاركت في تنظيم العمل داخل الورشات ومتابعة جودة التنفيذ واحترام معايير السلامة. بصفتي رئيس فريق، كنت مسؤولًا عن توزيع المهام، الإشراف على العمال، وضمان إنجاز المشاريع في الوقت المحدد وبكفاءة عالية.

دافعي الأساسي للعمل هو تطوير مسيرتي المهنية واكتساب خبرات جديدة في بيئة عمل احترافية تستخدم تقنيات ومعايير حديثة في مجال الكهرباء والبناء. أتميز بالجدية، الانضباط، والقدرة على العمل ضمن فريق وتحمل المسؤولية.

أرغب في العمل في الخارج لأن ذلك يتيح لي فرصًا أفضل للتطور المهني والاستقرار، إضافة إلى العمل في سوق منظم يحترم الكفاءة والخبرة. كما أنني متحمس لتعلم أساليب عمل جديدة، تحسين مهاراتي، والمساهمة بخبرتي في إنجاح المشاريع التي أعمل بها.

إذا تحب:

أعدّلها لتناسب دولة معيّنة

أو أجعلها أقصر أو أكثر رسمية

أو أترجمها للإنجليزية أو الفرنسية أو الألمانية

قلّي وش تحب، ونظبطها على قياسك 💪⚡

name: Adrian Innmon
message:
Hello, my name is Adrian Innmon.
I am a student at the University of Arkansas majoring in finance. All of my extracurriculars have been geared toward finance, and I would like to say I have the chance to make it into high finance in the future. However, I have recently had an epiphany that I am not happy. I want nothing to do with finance. Being rich doesn’t sound too bad but having a corrupt and empty soul does.
Over the month, I have been working to position myself to learn useful skills that have physical manifestations while serving nature. I have applied for tons of ranch and farmhand jobs, as well as nature conservation roles, because I realized when I was working a full-time internship in accounting over the summer, my work meant nothing. I was replaceable, and it didn’t fulfill me in the slightest.
I ran an Investment Banking Club, won competitive case studies, and so on, but I realized the only time I have ever felt happy is outside in nature. And as someone whose dream is to be a rancher I want to learn the skills necessary to become a successful rancher and I’m hoping you can show me!
If you provide me with a place to foster my skills and love to help the world, I will contribute to the farm with an strong work ethic, physical strength and passion for your businesses success as well as the beautiful animals and land.

message:

name: Abraham Obadare
message:
Abraham Obadare is a highly experienced Electrical Engineer and Maintenance Professional with over 15 years of hands-on experience across the UAE and Nigeria. His career spans residential and commercial construction, industrial training, estate contracting, and facility maintenance — demonstrating a well-rounded technical profile and consistent ability to deliver quality outcomes in demanding environments.
Career Timeline
General Maintenance Technician
Saeed Mohamed Salmeen Ali Almazrouei  |  Madinat Zayed, Abu Dhabi, UAE  |  September 2024 – Present
•	Carries out scheduled and corrective maintenance on electrical, plumbing, and HVAC systems for residential and commercial properties.
•	Ensures full compliance with UAE Abu Dhabi Distribution Company (ADDC) standards and local building codes.
•	Manages emergency maintenance requests within SLA timelines, maintaining detailed maintenance logs and service records.
•	Coordinates with contractors and procurement teams for materials and spare parts.
Electrician / Plumber
Miftah Baitk General Contracting  |  Al Sila, Abu Dhabi, UAE  |  October 2021 – September 2024
•	Installed, tested, and commissioned low-voltage electrical systems (distribution boards, wiring, switches, sockets) to IEC and UAE standards.
•	Performed installation and maintenance of water supply, drainage, and sanitation systems.
•	Interpreted technical drawings and specifications; achieved consistent first-time fault fix rate improvements.
•	Maintained a zero lost-time incident record throughout tenure by upholding strict HSE protocols.
Pre-Paid Meter Installer
IBEDC / Protogy  |  Ibadan, Nigeria  |  May 2021 – September 2021
•	Installed and commissioned residential and commercial prepaid electricity meters in accordance with IBEDC technical guidelines.
•	Conducted site surveys, meter box installations, and customer connection activities, including post-installation technical support.
Electrical Contractor
MBX Estates Services Ltd  |  FCT Abuja, Nigeria  |  February 2013 – December 2019
•	Led full electrical contracting works for residential estate developments — wiring, DB installation, earthing systems, and external lighting.
•	Supervised teams of 5–10 electricians, managed material take-offs, cost estimates, and project reporting.
•	All completed installations passed regulatory inspection by the Standards Organisation of Nigeria (SON).
Industrial Training Student (Electrical)
Yom-Tech Electrical Company  |  Sango Ibadan, Nigeria  |  March – August 2009
•	Received structured hands-on training in electrical panel assembly, wiring techniques, and safety procedures.
CORE SKILLS & COMPETENCIES
Technical Skills
Electrical installation & maintenance
Plumbing — supply, drainage & sanitation
HVAC maintenance & servicing
Prepaid meter installation & commissioning
Low-voltage systems (IEC, BS 7671)
Distribution boards & earthing systems
Fault diagnosis & first-time fix
Technical drawing & schematic interpretation	Professional & Regulatory Skills
Safety compliance: UAE ADDC/DEWA, IEC, BS 7671
HSE protocols — zero lost-time incident record
Multi-trade team supervision (up to 10 staff)
Project scheduling & progress reporting
Material take-offs & cost estimation
Regulatory inspection & compliance sign-off
Maintenance logging & audit documentation
English (Fluent — written and spoken)
Qualifications & Certifications
•	Federal Ministry of Labour Trade Test — Grade I (Highest), Grade II & Grade III in Electrical Installation & Maintenance Work (2007–2009)
•	Full Technical Certificate — Electrical Installation & Maintenance Work, NABTEB, Nigeria (2010)
•	Technical Diploma — Electrical Installation & Maintenance Work, Government Technical College, Nigeria (2007–2010)
•	Certificate — Business Ideas and Management, Green White Technologies Ltd (2014)
MOTIVATION FOR WORKING IN EUROPE
Abraham is actively seeking opportunities to bring his extensive technical expertise to Europe, driven by a combination of professional ambition, a commitment to high standards, and a desire to contribute to the growing demand for skilled trades across the continent.
Professional Growth
Having built a strong foundation in some of the world’s most demanding environments — including major UAE construction and maintenance projects — Abraham is eager to bring that experience to European standards frameworks such as BS 7671 and EN standards. He sees Europe as an environment where precision, safety culture, and continuous professional development are highly valued, reflecting his own professional ethos throughout his career.
Contribution to the Skilled Trades Shortage
Many European countries are facing a well-documented shortage of qualified electricians and multi-trade maintenance professionals. Abraham brings over 15 years of verified, certified experience, including the highest-grade trade test certification from Nigeria’s Federal Ministry of Labour and Productivity, and a proven track record working to international regulatory standards. He is ready to contribute meaningfully from day one.
Adaptability & International Experience
Abraham’s career demonstrates strong adaptability — he successfully transitioned from Nigeria’s regulatory environment to the UAE’s strict ADDC/DEWA standards, operating fluently across different building codes, client expectations, and working cultures. This cross-cultural experience positions him well to integrate effectively within a European workplace. He is fluent in English and has extensive experience working alongside diverse, multinational teams.
Long-Term Commitment
Abraham is not seeking a short-term placement. His motivation is to establish a stable, long-term career in Europe — contributing reliably to an employer’s operations while continuing to develop professionally. He is prepared to undergo any required skills assessment, bridging training, or certification recognition processes as part of a smooth transition into the European labour market.

name: Nafees Farooq
message:
Am Managed trial plots for hybrid maize and wheat varieties across 50+ acres in Punjab, monitoring germination rates, plant vigor, and disease resistance other skills are 
1:Data & Research*: Collected and analyzed field data on yield performance, achieving 12% higher accuracy in variety selection reports for R&D team
2:Farmer Engagement: Trained 200+ farmers on seed sowing techniques, fertilizer use, and crop management, resulting in 18% average yield improvement
3: Quality Control:  Conducted seed sampling and purity tests per ISTA standards, ensuring 98% compliance in all dispatched lots
4: Sales Support: Provided technical support to dealers in 3 districts, contributing to 25% growth in seasonal seed sales.
I want to work in Europe to gain exposure to advanced seed technologies and precision agriculture practices. European seed companies lead in R&D, biotechnology, and sustainable farming. With my field experience in hybrid maize and wheat trials, I’m eager to learn modern breeding techniques, digital phenotyping, and EU seed regulations to bring more value to global food security.
Europe has some of the strictest seed quality and certification standards like OECD and UPOV. Having worked with ISTA standards for purity testing and managed 50+ acres of trial plots, I’m motivated to work where I can upgrade my skills in international QC protocols and contribute to high-standard seed production systems.
During farmer trainings in Punjab, I saw how better seed varieties directly improve yields and livelihoods. Europe’s focus on climate-resilient crops and sustainable agriculture aligns with my goal. I want to be part of teams developing seeds that address global challenges like drought and disease, while learning farmer-extension models I can adapt internationally.

name: MOHAMED KHAIT
message:
Bewerbung als Landwirtschaftlicher Mitarbeiter
Sehr geehrte Damen und Herren,
mit großem Interesse habe ich erfahren, dass Ihr Unternehmen Mitarbeiter im landwirtschaftlichen Bereich sucht. Hiermit bewerbe ich mich als landwirtschaftlicher Mitarbeiter in Ihrem Betrieb.
Ich verfüge über mehr als acht Jahre praktische Erfahrung in der Landwirtschaft, insbesondere im Bereich Bewässerungssysteme, Gewächshausproduktion und Geflügelproduktion. Während meiner bisherigen Tätigkeit arbeitete ich intensiv mit modernen Pivot-Bewässerungssystemen und Fertigationstechniken. Außerdem habe ich umfangreiche Erfahrung im Anbau verschiedener Feld- und Gemüsekulturen wie Tomaten, Paprika, Gurken, Kartoffeln, Mais und Weizen.
Durch meine Arbeit habe ich fundierte Kenntnisse in Pflanzenpflege, Schädlingsbekämpfung und landwirtschaftlicher Projektorganisation erworben. Ich bin körperlich belastbar, zuverlässig und arbeite sowohl selbstständig als auch sehr gut im Team.
Mein Ziel ist es, meine praktischen Fähigkeiten und Erfahrungen in einem modernen landwirtschaftlichen Betrieb in Deutschland einzusetzen und gleichzeitig meine beruflichen Kenntnisse weiterzuentwickeln.
Ich freue mich sehr über die Möglichkeit, Teil Ihres Teams zu werden und einen Beitrag zum Erfolg Ihres Unternehmens zu leisten.
Für ein persönliches Gespräch stehe ich jederzeit gerne zur Verfügung.
Mit freundlichen Grüßen
Mohamed Abdelkader

name: Elton Emmanuel Mwakisyombe
message:
Naomba unisadie muongozo wa kuniandikia na kujaza hiyo sehemu ya Maelezo kunihusu

Hiyo sehemu ya “Tell us about yourself” ni muhimu sana—hapo ndipo unaonyesha uwezo wako, uzoefu, na sababu ya kwanini wanapaswa kukuchagua. Nitakupa muongozo rahisi + mfano ambao unaweza ku-copy na kurekebisha kidogo kulingana na hali yako.

Jinsi ya kuandika
Andika kwa mpangilio huu mfupi:

Utambulisho wako (elimu + background)

Uzoefu wa kazi au ujuzi

Sifa zako binafsi (mfano: hardworking, reliable)

Sababu ya kutaka kazi Ulaya

Utayari wako kufanya kazi

Mfano (Unaweza kutumia moja kwa moja)
Toleo la Kiingereza (linapendekezwa):

I am a hardworking and motivated individual with a High School education in Agriculture from Pugu Secondary School (2016). I have experience in general labor, including farming, manual work, and basic maintenance tasks. I am physically fit, quick to learn, and able to work under minimal supervision.

I am reliable, disciplined, and committed to delivering quality work. I work well both independently and as part of a team.

I am highly motivated to work in Europe to gain international experience, improve my skills, and support my family. I am ready to work in any available position and adapt to new environments.

Kama unataka iwe rahisi zaidi (short version):
I am a hardworking and reliable person with a High School education in Agriculture. I have experience in manual work and farming. I am physically fit, quick to learn, and able to work in a team. I am motivated to work in Europe to gain experience and improve my life. I am ready to start work immediately.

Vidokezo muhimu
Epuka Kiswahili hapo—tumia Kiingereza

Usiandike story ndefu sana (paragraph 1–2 zinatosha)

Taja nguvu zako (mfano: strong, honest, punctual)

Onyesha uko tayari kufanya kazi yoyote

Kama unataka, niambie:

Umewahi kufanya kazi gani hasa

Una skills gani (mfano: driving, construction, cleaning, n.k.)

Nitakutengenezea version maalum kabisa kulingana na wewe 👍


Naomba nikuelezee mimi ni nani kisha utaniandikia,

Naitwa Elton Emmanuel, mzaliwa wa Tanzania kijana wa miaka 27, elimu yangu ni sekondari na baada ya kumaliza shule nilienda kufanya kazi kama dereva wa shamba na msaidizi wa shamba kwenye Shamba la familia huko mkoani bukoba mwaka 2017 hadi 2024, mimi ni mchapakazi sana hasa kwenye kazi nizipendazo kama mambo ya shamba,ufugaji mimea na wanyama lakini pia lengo la kutafuta kazi Europe ni kujiendeleza kiuchumi,kupata exposure, kujifunza mambo mapya toka upande huo wa Dunia lakini pia napenda kuishi Europe siku moja hivyo nipo tayari kujidhatiti kwenye kazi kwa moyo wote na nipo tayari kusafiri na kuanza kazi muda wowote kuanzia sasa, Ahsante 

Hii hapa nimekuandikia maelezo yako kwa Kiingereza, yakiwa yamepangwa vizuri na kitaalamu ili uyaweke moja kwa moja kwenye hiyo sehemu:

Final Version (weka hii):

My name is Elton Emmanuel, a 27-year-old from Tanzania. I have a High School education and a strong background in agriculture. After completing my studies, I worked from 2017 to 2024 on a family farm in Bukoba as a farm assistant and driver. My responsibilities included crop farming, livestock care, and general farm operations.

I am a hardworking, reliable, and dedicated individual, especially passionate about agriculture and animal care. I am physically fit, disciplined, and able to work under pressure with minimal supervision. I also work well in a team and adapt quickly to new environments.

My goal in seeking employment in Europe is to improve my economic situation, gain international exposure, and learn new skills. I am highly motivated and committed to giving my best in any job opportunity. I am ready to travel and start work immediately.

Kama unataka iwe na nguvu zaidi kidogo (stronger version), naweza pia kukuongezea vitu kama:

uwezo wa kuendesha aina gani za gari

lugha unazojua (mfano English, Kiswahili)

au aina ya kazi unayotaka Ulaya

Niambie tu, nikuboreshie zaidi 👍


Weka Sawa utakavyo, mimi naendesha Light vehicles Manuel na automatic 

Sawa, nimeboresha maelezo yako na kuongeza uwezo wako wa kuendesha magari ili yawe na nguvu zaidi na yaonekane kitaalamu:

Final Version (weka hii):

My name is Elton Emmanuel, a 27-year-old from Tanzania. I have a High School education with a background in Agriculture. From 2017 to 2024, I worked on a family farm in Bukoba as a farm assistant and driver. My responsibilities included crop farming, livestock care, and general farm operations.

I have experience driving light vehicles (both manual and automatic), and I am confident in handling transport and farm-related duties. I am physically fit, hardworking, reliable, and able to work under minimal supervision. I am also a fast learner and can easily adapt to new environments and responsibilities.

I am passionate about agriculture and animal care, and I always give my best in any task I am assigned. I work well both independently and as part of a team.

My goal is to work in Europe to improve my economic situation, gain international exposure, and learn new skills. I am highly motivated, disciplined, and ready to commit myself fully to any opportunity. I am available to travel and start work immediately.

location: Al Nakheel, Ras Al Khaimah, UAE
message:
With 4.5 years of dedicated experience as a Project Planner across the construction and manufacturing sectors, I have developed a specialized focus on the modular and precast industries. My background in developing detailed project schedules and implementing efficient process monitoring techniques aligns perfectly with the innovative nature of modular construction.

​Currently, I serve as a Planning Engineer at Sobha Modular Industries LLC, where I manage production planning and logistics for high-volume prefab bathroom pod manufacturing. My tenure there has been marked by several key achievements:

​Scale Management: Developed and managed production schedules for over 15,000 pods using Primavera P6 and MS Project.

​Process Innovation: Spearheaded the implementation of Odoo ERP for project planning and introduced new reporting standards that ensured zero non-conformities in audits.

​Strategic Oversight: Created KPI frameworks for team members to guarantee quantifiable performance monitoring and alignment with production goals.

​Prior to this, my experience at Katerra India allowed me to master precast construction planning for large-scale residential and commercial projects, such as the Bosch Adugodi office space and various villa constructions. I am highly proficient in Primavera P6, Microsoft Project, and SAP, utilizing these tools to manage material procurement, logistics, and delay mitigation.

name: Sandra Kenneth
message:
I am a skilled Carpenter with over 5 years of practical experience in furniture making, woodwork, installation, and general carpentry services. I worked for 2 years at Kenpat Carpentry Workshop and 3 years at Okeyson Carpentry Workshop in Nigeria, where I gained hands-on experience in producing and installing wardrobes, cabinets, tables, chairs, doors, and other wooden structures.

My daily responsibilities included measuring materials, cutting and shaping wood, assembling furniture, sanding, polishing, repairs, and ensuring quality finishing according to customer requirements. I also worked with hand tools and power tools while maintaining workplace safety and cleanliness.

Through these roles, I developed strong skills in:

* Furniture production and installation
* Wood cutting, shaping, and finishing
* Use of carpentry tools and machines
* Reading basic technical drawings and measurements
* Attention to detail and quality control
* Teamwork and time management
* Problem-solving and adaptability

I am motivated to work in Europe because I want to grow professionally in a more advanced working environment where I can improve my carpentry skills, gain international experience, and contribute my knowledge to construction and furniture projects. Europe offers opportunities for skilled workers, structured career growth, and high standards in craftsmanship, which align with my long-term career goals.

I am hardworking, disciplined, willing to learn new methods, and ready to relocate and contribute positively to any organization that values skilled craftsmanship.
